site.title: Cosmic Journal
site.tagline: Walk the stars. Leave a planet.
auth.heading: Sign in to claim your planet
auth.sent: Check your email for the link.
login.demo: Demo mode — sign-in is disabled until Supabase is configured.
login.error.authFailed: That link didn't work. Please request a new one.
login.error.notConfigured: Sign-in is disabled in demo mode.
login.error.missingCode: The magic link is missing its code. Please try again.
editor.title: A new planet awaits
editor.subtitle: Pour your moment into this world
editor.analyzing: The cosmos is reading your words…
editor.analyzingHint: Gemini is shaping your planet's color and writing a poem.
editor.error.authRequired: Please sign in to leave a planet.
editor.error.claimed: Another traveler already claimed this coordinate. Try a new space.
editor.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
editor.demoBadge: Demo — nothing will be saved. Sign in to keep your planet.
editor.demoSaveHint: This is a preview. Sign in to save this planet to the universe.
universe.hint.desktop: WASD to fly · drag to look · click empty space to plant a new world.
universe.hint.mobile: Drag to look · tap empty space to plant a new world.
share.commentsDisabled: Comments unlock once the server is configured.
landing.demoBanner: 🛰 Demo mode — read-only until Supabase & Gemini keys are set.
landing.ctaHint: Explore without login · Sign in to leave a planet.
